notes: Excellent execution. Agent identified all 7 expected key decisions plus 19 additional consensus items with high accuracy. Context consistently explains alternatives considered and reasoning. Participant attribution is precise with helpful role clarification. Structure is professional, well-organized by agenda topic, and includes useful summary with follow-up flags, action items with deadlines, and appendix. Correctly distinguished final vs. tentative decisions. Minor deductions: (1) created redundant decisions_1.md file; (2) referenced non-existent zip archive in prose; (3) some decisions granular enough to warrant questioning (though granularity adds value). Deliverable is immediately usable as meeting minutes.
